quotes.text: 如果你家境一般，没有任何社会资源，不要学金融。
quotes.text_en: If your family is average with no connections, don't study finance.
quotes.context: 谈论金融专业就业门槛，强调金融行业对家庭背景和人脉资源的依赖

quotes.text: 计算机专业是普通家庭孩子改变命运性价比最高的专业。
quotes.text_en: Computer science is the most cost-effective major for kids from ordinary families to change their destiny.
quotes.context: 推荐普通家庭考生选择技术类专业

quotes.text: 生化环材，四大天坑，能不碰就别碰。
quotes.text_en: Biology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, Materials — the four pitfall majors. Avoid them if you can.
quotes.context: 警告考生慎选就业前景不佳的理科专业

quotes.text: 医学专业，穷人家孩子的好选择，但你要能吃苦。学制长、考试多，但一旦熬出来，越老越值钱。
quotes.text_en: Medicine is a good choice for kids from poor families, but you must be able to endure hardship. Long study period, many exams, but once you make it through, you become more valuable with age.
quotes.context: 分析医学专业的利弊，强调延迟回报

quotes.text: 新闻学，如果你家里没有矿，就别报了。
quotes.text_en: Journalism — don't apply unless your family is wealthy.
quotes.context: 批评新闻学专业就业难、薪资低

quotes.text: 电气工程，闷声发大财的专业。国家电网、南方电网，你进去了就知道有多香。
quotes.text_en: Electrical Engineering — a major that quietly makes you rich. Get into State Grid or Southern Power Grid, and you'll know how good it is.
quotes.context: 推荐电气工程专业，强调国企就业优势

quotes.text: 法学，除了五院四系，其他学校的法学，就业很难。
quotes.text_en: For law, unless you're at the top 'Five Institutes and Four Schools', finding a job is really hard.
quotes.context: 强调法学专业的学校层次对就业的决定性影响

quotes.text: 土木工程，以前是香饽饽，现在是大坑。房地产黄金时代过去了。
quotes.text_en: Civil Engineering used to be a goldmine, now it's a big pit. The golden era of real estate is over.
quotes.context: 分析土木工程专业随行业变化的就业前景

quotes.text: 师范专业，铁饭碗中的铁饭碗。女生首选，稳定、体面、有寒暑假。
quotes.text_en: Teaching is the most secure iron rice bowl. Top choice for girls — stable, respectable, with winter and summer breaks.
quotes.context: 推荐师范专业的稳定性和生活质量优势

quotes.text: 选专业就是选赛道。你选错了赛道，再努力也是白搭。
quotes.text_en: Choosing a major is choosing your track. Pick the wrong track, and no amount of effort will save you.
quotes.context: 强调专业选择的重要性，比努力更重要

quotes.text: 能上985的计算机，不要去211的金融。
quotes.text_en: If you can get into a 985 university for CS, don't go to a 211 for finance.
quotes.context: 比较不同层次学校和专业的性价比

quotes.text: 护理专业别看不起，三甲医院的护士，收入不比很多白领差。
quotes.text_en: Don't look down on nursing — nurses at top-tier hospitals earn no less than many white-collar workers.
quotes.context: 为护理专业正名，强调实际收入水平

quotes.text: 心理学本科就业很难，除非你读到博士。大部分心理学毕业生最后都转行了。
quotes.text_en: Psychology undergrads have a hard time finding jobs unless you get a PhD. Most end up switching careers.
quotes.context: 分析心理学专业的就业困境

quotes.text: 学设计、学艺术，家里没矿真的别碰。投入大、回报慢，还得拼审美天赋。
quotes.text_en: Don't study design or art unless your family is wealthy. High investment, slow returns, and you need aesthetic talent.
quotes.context: 警示艺术类专业的高投入和不确定回报

quotes.text: 小语种曾经很吃香，现在AI翻译这么强，你学四年出来发现机器比你翻得好。
quotes.text_en: Minor languages used to be popular, but now AI translation is so good that after four years you'll find machines translate better than you.
quotes.context: 分析AI对外语专业的冲击

quotes.text: 农学不是种地，但你得接受毕业后大概率去基层的现实。
quotes.text_en: Agriculture isn't farming, but you have to accept that you'll most likely end up at the grassroots level after graduation.
quotes.context: 客观分析农学专业的就业去向

quotes.text: 会计这个专业，以前是铁饭碗，现在AI记账比你快一万倍。基础会计岗位正在消失。
quotes.text_en: Accounting used to be an iron rice bowl, but now AI bookkeeping is 10,000 times faster than you. Entry-level accounting jobs are disappearing.
quotes.context: 分析AI对会计专业的冲击

quotes.text: 药学比临床医学好就业，学制短，进药企、进医院药房都行，性价比高。
quotes.text_en: Pharmacy is easier to find jobs in than clinical medicine — shorter study period, you can work at pharma companies or hospital pharmacies. High cost-effectiveness.
quotes.context: 推荐药学作为医学的替代选择

quotes.text: 自动化和人工智能是未来十年最确定的方向，但你数学得好。
quotes.text_en: Automation and AI are the most certain directions for the next decade, but your math needs to be strong.
quotes.context: 推荐AI相关专业，强调数学基础

quotes.text: 想当兵、想当警察，提前批是最好的机会。军校警校出来国家包分配，铁饭碗中的铁饭碗。
quotes.text_en: If you want to join the military or police, early admission is the best chance. Military and police academies guarantee job placement — the ultimate iron rice bowl.
quotes.context: 推荐军校警校的提前批机会

quotes.text: 建筑学黄金时代已经过去了。以前建筑老八校出来年薪百万，现在画图到凌晨三点月薪八千。
quotes.text_en: Architecture's golden era is over. Graduates from the top eight used to earn a million a year; now they draw blueprints until 3 AM for 8,000 a month.
quotes.context: 分析建筑学随房地产下行的就业变化

quotes.text: 汉语言文学，考公务员的神器。你看看公务员岗位，一半以上都要中文系。
quotes.text_en: Chinese Language & Literature — the ultimate weapon for civil service exams. Look at government positions: more than half require Chinese majors.
quotes.context: 推荐汉语言文学专业的考公优势

quotes.text: 公共管理本科就是个万金油，啥都学一点、啥都不精通。想进体制还不如直接学法学或中文。
quotes.text_en: Public Administration undergrad is a jack of all trades — learns a bit of everything, masters nothing. Want to enter government? Study law or Chinese instead.
quotes.context: 批评公共管理专业的本科就业竞争力

quotes.text: 电子商务听起来高大上，其实就业面很窄。真正做电商的老板没几个是学电商的。
quotes.text_en: E-commerce sounds impressive, but the career scope is narrow. Very few successful e-commerce bosses actually studied it.
quotes.context: 批评电子商务专业的实用性

quotes.text: 统计学和数据科学，闷声发大财的专业。互联网要你，金融要你，政府也要你。
quotes.text_en: Statistics and Data Science — majors that quietly make you rich. Tech wants you, finance wants you, government wants you too.
quotes.context: 推荐统计学的广泛就业面
related_majors: 数据科学与大数据技术

quotes.text: 兽医其实是个好专业，宠物经济爆发，现在宠物医生比人医还难挂号。
quotes.text_en: Veterinary medicine is actually a great major. With the pet economy booming, pet doctors are now harder to book than human doctors.
quotes.context: 分析宠物经济对兽医专业的利好

quotes.text: 体育生别只会练体育，体育+教育、体育+管理才有出路。纯竞技那条路太窄了。
quotes.text_en: Sports students shouldn't just train — sports + education or sports + management is the way out. Pure athletics is too narrow a path.
quotes.context: 建议体育生拓展复合方向

quotes.text: 国际贸易这个专业，听起来高端大气上档次，实际上本科出来就是个外贸业务员，拿着底薪等提成。
quotes.text_en: International Trade sounds high-end, but undergrads end up as foreign trade clerks on base salary waiting for commissions.
quotes.context: 揭示国际贸易专业的就业现实
